Aisha.name: Aisha
preferences: likes coffee, specifically oat milk lattes
hates surprises, prefers being told in advance
loves hiking and being outdoors on weekends
prefers handwritten notes over expensive gifts
enjoys quiet one-on-one time over group social settings
likes when plans are structured rather than vague
prefers emotional consistency over intense but irregular affection
conversation_style: uses emojis often but not in every message
sends short replies during work hours
replies fast in the evening after 7pm
goes quiet instead of arguing when upset
responds better to calm tone than emotional escalation
prefers clarity over ambiguity in conversations
notes: gets self-conscious about being 'too much' emotionally, reassurance helps
had a rough breakup before this relationship, takes trust-building seriously
values consistency more than intensity in relationships
withdraws when overwhelmed rather than confronting directly
responds positively to specific plans instead of open-ended suggestions
can misinterpret delays as emotional distance if context is missing
appreciates when partner acknowledges her emotional state without over-analysis

Raj.name: Raj
preferences: into football and follows Arsenal closely
favorite cuisine is biryani, has strong opinions on where to get it
prefers voice notes over long texts
likes gym and tracks his lifts
into strategy video games on weekends
enjoys competitive discussion and debating sports tactics
prefers direct communication over emotional framing
values efficiency in conversations rather than long explanations
conversation_style: replies slow on weekdays, fast on weekends
communicates mostly in memes and one-liners
goes deep and serious only when something's actually wrong
rarely initiates plans first but always shows up
avoids long emotional conversations unless necessary
uses humor as default communication mode
responds better to casual tone than formal messaging
notes: recently started a new job and has been more stressed than usual
not big on public displays of appreciation, prefers it said directly one-on-one
has helped plan two surprise events before, good instincts for logistics
very loyal friend but emotionally low-expressiveness is normal for him
becomes more talkative when discussing football or gym progress
may ignore messages during work but always replies later
values long-term friendship consistency over frequent communication
